name: weighpro
description: Modern weighbridge platform with web, Electron station bridge, Supabase, camera, and order-note integrations.

scripts.dev:web: npm --workspace @weighpro/core run build && npm --workspace @weighpro/web run dev
scripts.dev:desktop: npm --workspace @weighpro/core run build && npm --workspace @weighpro/desktop run dev
scripts.build: npm --workspace @weighpro/core run build && npm --workspace @weighpro/web run build && npm --workspace @weighpro/desktop run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @weighpro/core run build && npm --workspace @weighpro/web run typecheck && npm --workspace @weighpro/desktop run typecheck
scripts.lint: npm --workspace @weighpro/core run build && npm --workspace @weighpro/web run lint && npm --workspace @weighpro/desktop run lint
